description: User clicks the 'CONTINUE' button on the baggage selection page to proceed to traveller details.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the green 'CONTINUE' button at the bottom of the page.

description: A loading overlay appears with the message 'Thanks for confirming your flights' and 'Next up, your traveller details...'.
frame_description: A semi-transparent overlay with a loading spinner and confirmation text is visible over the previous page content.

description: The browser navigates from the results page to the passenger details page.
frame_description: The URL changes in the address bar, and the page content transitions from the loading state to the 'Travellers' page layout.

description: User waits for the 'Travellers' page to fully load and begins to examine the flight summary and sign-in options.
frame_description: The 'Travellers' page is visible, showing a flight summary on the right and a sign-in prompt. The main form content is still rendering.
